---
draft: false
title: "COVID-19 mortality effect — Mexico"
description: "COVID-19 deaths and excess mortality across Mexican states, 2020. Draws on the national epidemiological death registry (SEED) to compare 2020 mortality rates against historical baselines and identify where reclassification may have understated the pandemic's toll."
date: 2020-09-10
date-modified: 2020-09-10
categories: [Visualisation, Interactive, Tableau, COVID-19, Mortality, Mexico, Public Health]
image: ../../assets/images/img-timeseries.svg
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

[← Back to Portfolio](../../portfolio.html){.back-link}

::: {.label}
Interactive · COVID-19 Mortality · Mexico · SEED Registry · 2020
:::

Official COVID-19 death counts depend on testing capacity, reporting systems, and the criteria used to classify causes of death. In Mexico in 2020, questions arose early about whether deaths were being attributed to other causes — particularly viral pneumonia — in ways that understated the true COVID burden. This dashboard examines that question using the SEED (Sistema Epidemiológico y Estadístico de las Defunciones), the national death registry, which covers all recorded deaths going back to 1998.

By comparing 2020 mortality rates against the historical average for the same period, the excess mortality picture becomes visible regardless of how individual deaths were classified. The state-level breakdown reveals the uneven geography of the pandemic's first wave: Mexico City was hit first and hardest, but several southern and central states with reporting delays showed elevated mortality months later.

The analysis connects to a [longer write-up on the data](../../blog/2020-09-10-covid19-mexico.html).

## How to read it

The main view shows mortality rates per 100,000 inhabitants by state and month. Use the historical comparison panel to see how 2020 diverged from the 1998–2019 average. The cause-of-death breakdown shows the proportion attributed to COVID-19 versus pneumonia and other respiratory causes.

## Data

SEED (Sistema Epidemiológico y Estadístico de las Defunciones), SINAIS / DGIS, 1998–September 2020. Federal death registry, Mexico.

::: {.column-screen}

```{=html}
<div class="tableauPlaceholder" id="viz2008" style="position: relative">
  <noscript>
    <a href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/edgar.rodriguez.huerta/viz/DefuncionesCOVID19-Mexico/EfectoCOVID">
      <img alt="EfectoCOVID" src="https://public.tableau.com/static/images/De/DefuncionesCOVID19-Mexico/EfectoCOVID/1_rss.png" style="border: none">
    </a>
  </noscript>
  <object class="tableauViz" style="display:none;">
    <param name="host_url" value="https%3A%2F%2Fpublic.tableau.com%2F">
    <param name="embed_code_version" value="3">
    <param name="site_root" value="">
    <param name="name" value="DefuncionesCOVID19-Mexico/EfectoCOVID">
    <param name="tabs" value="no">
    <param name="toolbar" value="yes">
    <param name="static_image" value="https://public.tableau.com/static/images/De/DefuncionesCOVID19-Mexico/EfectoCOVID/1.png">
    <param name="animate_transition" value="yes">
    <param name="display_static_image" value="yes">
    <param name="display_spinner" value="yes">
    <param name="display_overlay" value="yes">
    <param name="display_count" value="yes">
    <param name="language" value="en-GB">
  </object>
</div>
<script type="text/javascript">
  var divElement = document.getElementById('viz2008');
  var vizElement = divElement.getElementsByTagName('object')[0];
  if (divElement.offsetWidth > 800) { vizElement.style.width = '100%'; vizElement.style.height = '827px'; }
  else if (divElement.offsetWidth > 500) { vizElement.style.width = '100%'; vizElement.style.height = '827px'; }
  else { vizElement.style.width = '100%'; vizElement.style.height = '727px'; }
  var scriptElement = document.createElement('script');
  scriptElement.src = 'https://public.tableau.com/javascripts/api/viz_v1.js';
  vizElement.parentNode.insertBefore(scriptElement, vizElement);
</script>
```

:::
